creator: midgoon@gmail.com
text:
Cannot see KDE software compiled on GNOME applications menu.

Ironic is, exist a ports for KDE to solve this issue:

/usr/ports/misc/kde4-xdg-env
/usr/ports/misc/kde-xdg-env

But is not exist for GNOME

Snapshot http://postimage.org/image/67ky03n71/full/

How-To-Repeat: 1. Uses FreeBSD with GNOME
2. Install any KDE software if you haven't got
3. See on GNOME applications list if listed
